description:
Why America is rebuilding the world's first bridge-tunnel.
Inspire the future scientists and engineers that you love by visiting https://www.kiwico.com/theb1m today! Use the code THEB1M for a whopping 50% off of your first monthly crate!

🔥 Pre-order Fred's book MEGA BUILDS now 👉 https://bit.ly/3Y63G6X

Full story here - https://theb1m.com/video/hampton-roads-bridge-tunnel-expansion

This video contains paid promotion for KiwiCo.

00:00 Intro
00:57 Norfolk, Virginia
01:43 What’s a Bridge-Tunnel?
02:32 Immersed Tubes
06:12 The HRBT
08:40 The TBM
10:00 The North Island
10:50 Mary’s Journey
12:43 The Bridges
14:18 The Result
14:58 Going to Plan?
16:20 Conclusion

Additional footage and images: Virginia Department of Transportation, U.S. Navy, Ben Schumin, Gordie Howe International Bridge, Herrenknecht, Lantis, 13News Now, WAVY TV 10 and WBFF FOX 45 Baltimore.

For more by The B1M subscribe now 👉 https://bit.ly/the-b1m
